write_file({"path": "internal/language_tiers/language_tiers.go", "contents": "package language_tiers\n\nimport \"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis\"\n\n// Tier represents a tier level for a programming language.\ntype Tier int\n\nconst (\n\tTierGeneric Tier = iota\n\tTierFull\n)\n\n// TierForLanguage returns the tier for the given language.\n// It delegates to analysis.ForLanguage to determine if the language is\n// registered for full analysis support.\nfunc TierForLanguage(lang string) Tier {\n\tif analysis.ForLanguage(lang) != nil {\n\t\treturn TierFull\n\t}\n\treturn TierGeneric\n}\n"}) → wrote internal/language_tiers/language_tiers.go (507 bytes)
write_file({"contents": "package language_tiers\n\nimport \"testing\"\n\nfunc TestTierForLanguage(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname string\n\t\tlang string\n\t\twant Tier\n\t}{\n\t\t{\"go\", \"go\", TierFull},\n\t\t{\"ts\", \"ts\", TierFull},\n\t\t{\"py\", \"py\", TierFull},\n\t\t{\"rs\", \"rs\", TierFull},\n\t\t{\"js\", \"js\", TierFull},\n\t\t{\"ruby\", \"ruby\", TierGeneric},\n\t\t{\"swift\", \"swift\", TierGeneric},\n\t\t{\"c\", \"c\", TierGeneric},\n\t\t{\"empty\", \"\", TierGeneric},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tgot := TierForLanguage(tt.lang)\n\t\t\tif got != tt.want {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"TierForLanguage(%q) = %v, want %v\", tt.lang, got, tt.want)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n", "path": "internal/language_tiers/language_tiers_test.go"}) → wrote internal/language_tiers/language_tiers_test.go (619 bytes)
